title: Frappe Visual Function Calling Schema
description: OpenAI/Claude function definitions for Frappe Visual

functions.name: get_app_map
functions.description: Get the full application structure map showing modules, doctypes, and their relationships as a graph

functions.name: get_doctype_relationships
functions.description: Get all relationships radiating from a single DocType as a graph with configurable depth

depth.description: How many relationship levels to traverse

functions.name: get_workspace_map
functions.description: Get a visual map of workspace shortcuts and links

workspace.description: Specific workspace name, or empty for all

functions.name: get_quick_stats
functions.description: Get quick statistics (module count, doctype count, reports, pages, workspaces)

app_name.description: Filter by app name, or empty for all

functions.name: get_license_status
functions.description: Get current license status and enabled features

functions.name: check_feature
functions.description: Check if a specific premium feature is enabled
